summary: FRONTEND-only validation of 3 UX changes (DegerArtisi page, HomeFormsSection after slider, mobile slider optimization). All 3 changes verified successfully on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Backend not retested per request (iteration_9 = 45/45 pass).

desktop_1920x1080.navbar_link_order_correct: Ana Sayfa > Hakkimda > Projeler > Guncel Ilanlar > Deger Artisi > Hesaplama > Blog > Iletisim
desktop_1920x1080.ekspertiz_persisted_in_admin_forms: Not detected via body text scan in /admin/forms (likely on a different sub-tab in admin UI). Submission API call succeeded (success modal shown). Manual verification recommended via tab switching.

mobile_390x844.whatsapp_sticky_button_visible_bottom_ri: Visible in screenshot (green circle bottom-right) - JS evaluator selector did not detect, but visually confirmed

critical_code_review_comments: EkspertizFormu.jsx submits via raw fetch instead of formsAPI service used by TalepFormu (inconsistent pattern). Suggest moving to formsAPI.submitEkspertiz for consistency.
Home.jsx isMobile detection uses typeof window check at module-eval time only (not reactive to resize). Fine for current use but consider useMediaQuery hook for future responsiveness.
Test seed data left in DB: 1 talep entry 'TEST_USER_<timestamp>' and 1 ekspertiz entry 'TEST_EKS_<timestamp>'. Main agent may want to add admin DELETE endpoints or clean manually.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 UX changes validated; ekspertiz admin display verification was inconclusive but submission itself works)

seed_data_creation: 1 talep + 1 ekspertiz entry created with TEST_ prefix for admin/forms verification - not cleaned up (no public delete endpoint discovered, manual cleanup needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 NEW UX changes are working correctly: (1) /deger-artisi page exists with hero+MarketTrends, navbar link present in correct position; (2) HomeFormsSection renders right after slider with SLA badge, tabs switch between Talep/Ekspertiz, both submit successfully showing success modals with '3 gun icinde' SLA text; (3) Mobile slider is 379.8px (45vh, max 400px), title is 24px (text-2xl), description hidden, hamburger menu works with Deger Artisi link. All regression pages return 200. Only minor inconclusive item: ekspertiz submission appears in admin/forms but my body-text scan did not catch it (likely on a sub-tab in AdminForms UI) - submission API call itself worked (success modal displayed).
